productDisplayName: Clarks Men Leather Brown Formal Shoes
description: A smart work and formal wear, the Enter Office leather shoe from clarks is absolutely stylish with its punched detailing. This classic men& rsquo s brogue comes with an anti-bacterial lining that makes it a healthy and comfortable all-day wear. Upper Full leather upper with strategically placed overlays and punched design detailing for breathable comfort and style Lacing system for a snug, customized Fit Brand name embossed on lateral ankle for style Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort Double layered footbed that doesn& rsquo t flatten out easily offering soft, cushioned, all-day comfort Bacterial lining for safe and healthy wear Outsole Hardwearing outsole made of TPU for long-lasting wear Discreet horizontal grooves on the forefoot and back heel for absolute grip and traction Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style Shoe care Wipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Brush using a branded leather conditioner to restore shoe shine Do not store in direct sunlight
